subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! My hope is that thou mayest be characterized by refinement of character, tenderness of heart, sublime spirituality and power [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان امیدم چنانست که بلطافت اخلاق و رقت قلب و روحانیت کبری و قوه
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @firmness in the Covenant, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
